allowMouseWheel.description: Whether to allow mouse wheel to change the value.

allowOverflow.description: Whether to allow the value to overflow the min/max range.

clampValueOnBlur.description: Whether to clamp the value when the input loses focus.

defaultValue.description: The initial value of the number input when uncontrolled.

disabled.description: Whether the number input is disabled.

focusInputOnChange.description: Whether to focus the input when the value changes.

form.description: The form attribute of the number input.

formatOptions.description: The format options for the number input.

id.description: The id of the number input.

ids.type:
Partial<{
  root: string
  label: string
  input: string
  incrementTrigger: string
  decrementTrigger: string
  scrubber: string
}>
ids.description: The element ids for the number input parts.

inputMode.description: The input mode for the number input.

invalid.description: Whether the number input is invalid.

max.description: The maximum value of the number input.

min.description: The minimum value of the number input.

name.description: The name attribute of the number input.

pattern.description: The pattern used to check the input value against.

readOnly.description: Whether the number input is read-only.

required.description: Whether the number input is required.

spinOnPress.description: Whether to spin the value when the increment/decrement button is held.

step.description: The amount to increment or decrement the value by.

translations.description: The translations for the number input.

value.description: The controlled value of the number input.
The number input primitive returned by useNumberInput().
